title: Asset/Inventory Assigning

posts.author: mike.palmer (Mike Palmer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guys

I have a board for assets (ipads) being used by the business. We have 4 ipads currently and what i am looking for is.

Staff fill in a form with their event they need the ipad for, and their start date they need and when they will be done.

I then want the automation to automatically assign an ipad (they are all named) to that request if it is not in use already in use over the selected dates.

Any suggestions on how to do this
